Motion To Set Aside Sanctions & Ordering Case To Trial
Off Calendar Jan-22-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Gregory M. Haynes, Esq., appearing for plaintiff and moving party. Scott D. Wiener, Deputy City Attorney, appearing for defendant City and County of San Francisco. John J. Ring, Esq., appearing for defendant Man Roland, Inc.
Plaintiff's Motion to Set Aside Sanctions issued to plaintiff's counsel Gregory M. Haynes, on 10/14/2003 in the amount of $350.00, and issued on 7/7/2003 in the amount of $350.00, and Ordering Case to Trial is heard this day. After argument of respective counsel court ordered motion to vacate sanctions granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Order signed in open court. Court ordered Motion for Preference for Trial Setting to be noticed in department 206. Proceedings reported by: Tina Paxton. (212)
